task_completion.description: Verify the 'Winter Garden Prep' Project Type is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the iDempiere 'Project Type' window, there is a saved record with the Name field set to 'Winter Garden Prep'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pruning' phase is configured with correct sequence and quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Project Phase' tab, there is a record with Name 'Pruning', Sequence (SeqNo) '10', and Standard Qty '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Mulching' phase is configured with correct sequence and quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Project Phase' tab, there is a record with Name 'Mulching', Sequence (SeqNo) '20', and Standard Qty '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Covering' phase is configured with correct sequence and quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Project Phase' tab, there is a record with Name 'Covering', Sequence (SeqNo) '30', and Standard Qty '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify all three phases are saved and belong to the 'Winter Garden Prep' Project Type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A grid or list view in the 'Project Phase' tab showing all three phases (Pruning, Mulching, Covering) under the parent Project Type 'Winter Garden Prep', indicating they have been successfully saved to this specific project type.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or direct database SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock the answer in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into actual iDempiere input fields, not written in a notepad, text editor, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the records were actually saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI shows indicators of saved records (e.g., a saved status message, the records appearing in a table/grid view, or the save button being successfully clicked) rather than just text typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Project Type Name: 'Winter Garden Prep'. Expected Phases: 1) Name: 'Pruning', Sequence: 10, Standard Qty: 1. 2) Name: 'Mulching', Sequence: 20, Standard Qty: 1. 3) Name: 'Covering', Sequence: 30, Standard Qty: 1.
